# Amalgamations 0.1.3 -> 0.1.4

## Added

- Added initial GitHub source repository structure
- Added issue templates for crash reports and modpack bugs

## Changed

- Moved tracked pack source into root-level `config`, `defaultconfigs`, and `kubejs` folders
- Updated repository layout to follow an ATM-style modpack source structure

## Fixed

- Fixed missing tracked changelog folder by adding this changelog file

## Removed

- Removed launcher/runtime files from the GitHub source layout

## Notes
